manifest.name: Image Markdown Description

name: Image Markdown Description

releases.author: satojin219
releases.description:
Initial release of **Image Markdown Description**.

A plugin that lets you edit image (PNG / JPEG) descriptions as Markdown directly inside the Obsidian image view, and persists the description into the image file itself:

- **PNG**: written to a `tEXt` chunk with the `Description` keyword
- **JPEG**: written to EXIF `ImageDescription`

## Features

- Inline description editor under the image
- Markdown rendering with one-click switch between edit and preview mode
- Internal link auto-completion (`[[note name]]`) while editing
- Auto-save on blur
- Non-image files are left untouched (no unnecessary binary reads)

## Install (manual)

Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into
`<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/image-md-description/` and enable the plugin.

Desktop only.
